concerns.text: T016 implements a global halt for N<10 (FR-009) but lacks a specific task to implement the per-subject exclusion logic for motion >3mm (FR-002). T014 calculates motion, but no task explicitly describes the logic to filter/exclude individual subjects based on that metric before the global count check.

T013 covers downloading data, but there is no task implementing the 'Simulation Mode' fallback logic described in plan.md (Summary). The plan requires the pipeline to 'automatically switch to Simulation Mode' if data is unavailable, but no task covers the generation of synthetic data or the state transition logic.

T024 calculates MSC and MAC, but the plan (Summary) and Spec (FR-005) require the primary metric to be Mean Signed Correlation (MSC) to preserve directionality. While T024 mentions MSC, there is no explicit task to ensure the *global mean metric* (FR-005) is calculated and stored as MSC specifically, distinct from the edge-wise testing in T030.

T031 generates a sensitivity curve (SC-005), but SC-002 requires measuring stability against the 'standard deviation of the permutation null distribution'. No task explicitly covers calculating, storing, or reporting this specific stability metric.

T030 implements edge-wise FDR (FR-011), but FR-008 requires FDR correction 'if testing more than one specific edge'. The task does not explicitly cover the logic to apply FDR to the *global mean metric* if it is tested across conditions, or clarify if the global metric is exempt. The scope is ambiguous regarding the global metric correction.
